caption: A group of men, wearing face masks and casual professional attire—mostly grey polo shirts and dark trousers—walk across a bright, sunlit outdoor plaza towards the viewer. The setting features manicured conical hedges, palm trees, and a modern white architectural structure with a decorative latticed screen. A white bus is visible in the background. A logo of Real Madrid is positioned in the top right corner of each scene. In the initial sequence, a man in a dark suit carries a black travel bag. On-screen text in the first scene reads "TEAM HOTEL 12.47". As the sequence progresses, the men move forward; the man in the suit exits the frame, and the focus shifts to those in grey polos. By the final scene, one man in a grey polo becomes the central figure as he walks toward the foreground, with others following behind him.
